property_details.address: Coastal Road, 90502 Flic en Flac, Mauritius
property_details.description:
Situated close to the main road leading to Flic en Flac beach, this luxurious 3-bedroom apartment offers a peaceful retreat on the West Coast. 

On hot summer days, take a refreshing dip in our swimming pool or enjoy a 7-minute walk through the vibrant Village of Flic en Flac to the stunning lagoon, sandy beaches, and local cuisine.
property_details.space:
Experience comfort and luxury in our three spacious bedrooms, each featuring a king-size bed for a restful night's sleep. Enjoy the convenience of air conditioning in every bedroom, ensuring a cool and comfortable stay. Plush towels and complimentary toiletries are provided for your convenience.

The fully equipped kitchen makes meal preparation a breeze, whether you're cooking up a storm or preparing a simple snack. Step outside onto the delightful patio, the perfect spot to unwind on a hot summer afternoon in the refreshing shade.
property_details.house_rules:
No Pets: Pets are not allowed unless prior arrangements have been made and approved.

Noise Levels: Please respect our neighbors by keeping noise to a minimum between 10 PM and 8 AM. No loud music or parties are allowed at any time.

Maximum Occupancy: The maximum number of guests allowed is 6. Additional guests are not permitted without prior approval.

Respect the Property: Please treat our home with respect and care. Any damage caused during your stay will result in additional charges.

Garbage Disposal: Dispose of garbage and recycling in the designated bins. Please follow local recycling guidelines.

Kitchen Use: Feel free to use the kitchen, but please clean up after yourself. Wash all dishes and utensils before departure.

Parking: Only park in the designated parking area. Do not block driveways or other vehicles.

Check-Out Procedures: Follow the check-out instructions provided. Ensure all doors and windows are locked, and keys are returned to the designated location.

No Illegal Activities: Engaging in any illegal activities on the property is strictly prohibited.

Fire Safety: Do not leave candles or open flames unattended. Familiarize yourself with the location of fire extinguishers and exits.

Energy Conservation: Turn off lights, air conditioning, and heating when not in use to conserve energy.

Lost and Found: The host is not responsible for any personal belongings left behind.

Please check the property thoroughly before departure.
property_details.guest_access:
Guests have full access to the apartment and the private patio. 

The complex features two gated entrances, one at the front and one at the back, for added convenience and security.
